/* 
//First free SMS is 107
#define Lord 107 
#define Lord2 108 
 
 
 
*/ 
 
 
 
/* 
//Copy from here 
PUSH 
 
SetSMS(Lord, 1, Lord_Data) 
SetSMS(Lord2, 1, Lord2_Data) 
 
 
POP 
//Copy until here 
*/ 
 
 
//SMS Image Data 
 
ALIGN 4 
Lord_Data: 
#incbin "dmp/Lord.dmp" 
 
ALIGN 4 
Lord2_Data: 
#incbin "dmp/Lord2.dmp"
